steps.description: Updated Content-Security-Policy in index.html to include api.binance.com, api.frankfurter.dev, and cdn.jsdelivr.net to fix chart and market data loading issues.
Disabled 3D Volume Analysis on mobile devices by adding a responsive check in Dashboard.tsx and conditional rendering.
Fixed Recharts width/height error in PieChart2D.tsx by providing a fallback height and improving ResponsiveContainer configuration.
Added 'Pending' badge to AI Financial Advisor in AIInsights.tsx as requested.
Created a new comprehensive Calendar component that handles Events, Memories (with Spotify integration), Reminders, and Tasks.
Integrated Calendar component into Dashboard.tsx, added state management for events, memories, and reminders, and replaced TaskManager with the new integrated Calendar.
Implemented automated logic to move passed events to memories and periodically check for updates.
Improved Push Notifications logic in notifications.ts for better mobile compatibility by adding channelId and permission re-checks.
Robustified data export functions in Dashboard.tsx for better mobile support by ensuring proper DOM attachment of download links.
Implemented algorithmic fallback for AI Insights in geminiService.ts to provide financial analysis even when the AI service is pending or unavailable.
Promoted Calendar to a top-level independent tab in the sidebar, replacing the Tasks tab, and kept a simplified Today view on the Dashboard.

Updated Calendar component inputs: Task list input as textarea, Event input with start/end times and Song(s) of the Day. Dashboard Today view now only shows date and event title with redirect to Calendar.
Linked Events and Memories: Automatic conversion now preserves description and songs_of_the_day. Memory UI updated to display these fields.
Implemented robust Global Currency Support (USD, EUR, GBP, INR, TZS, JPY, etc.) with real-time conversion rates and consistent symbol rendering across all dashboards.
Added 'Sync to Cloud' functionality with a dedicated button in the header and settings. Includes a visual feedback system for sync status and 'Last Synced' timestamps.
Reorganized Transaction Form layout for better UX: 'Scan Receipt with AI' moved to the top, and 'Expense/Income' toggle moved to the bottom of the form.
